summary: Completed comprehensive testing of K8s Maintenance Manager app. BUG FIX VERIFIED: Template updates now correctly refresh the dashboard IP Allowlist column. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed login, dashboard, IP Templates dialog, and Application Update dialog all work correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - onTemplatesChanged callback properly implemented in IPTemplatesDialog.js (lines 114, 129)
DashboardPage.js correctly passes onTemplatesChanged={fetchApplications} to IPTemplatesDialog (line 272)
Backend PUT /api/ip-templates/{template_id} correctly propagates changes to all linked applications
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data used: 3 templates (Office Network, VPN Network, Office LAN) and 2 applications (my-web-app, api-gateway)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified working. Template value restored to original 10.50.0.0/16. K8s middleware operations are MOCKED (expected - not a real K8s cluster). All core flows tested: login, dashboard, IP templates CRUD, application update dialog.

mocked_apis.note: Kubernetes Python Client calls are MOCKED (create/update/delete middleware) since environment is not a real K8s cluster

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: When user updates an IP template value in the IP Templates dialog, the dashboard IP Allowlist column should refresh to show the new value, but it was still showing old values
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added onTemplatesChanged callback from IPTemplatesDialog to DashboardPage so the applications list refreshes whenever a template is updated or deleted
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASSED - Dashboard correctly shows updated template value (10.77.0.0/16) immediately after template edit without manual refresh
affected_files: /app/frontend/src/components/IPTemplatesDialog.js - handleSaveEdit and handleDeleteTemplate now call onTemplatesChanged callback

passed_tests: Local login with super admin credentials
User info retrieval with valid token
Create template with invalid IP rejected
Template update propagates to linked applications (BUG FIX)
Template name update propagates to applications
Frontend: Dashboard loads with applications table
Frontend: IP Templates dialog opens and shows templates
Frontend: Template edit updates dashboard immediately (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
Frontend: Application Update dialog works with manual and template IPs
Frontend: Logout redirects to login page
